final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: e-commerce hero image, square crop
Primary request: smartwatch worn on wrist in active sports context, dynamic motion blur conveying energy and vitality
Scene/backdrop: blurred gym environment with exercise equipment, shallow depth of field background
Subject: modern smartwatch on athletic wrist, sleek wearable device with clean digital display, active pose suggesting movement
Style/medium: commercial product photography, high-end tech editorial
Composition/framing: close-up on wrist and watch, macro product shot with motion blur on background elements
Lighting/mood: cool-toned tech lighting, cyan and blue accent lights, dramatic rim lighting, energetic and futuristic mood
Color palette: cool tech blues + cyan + silver metal + deep shadows
Materials/textures: brushed aluminum or matte black watch case, smooth silicone or metal band, sweat-glistening skin
Constraints: keep smartwatch as sharp focal point while background has intentional motion blur, maintain readable watch face
Avoid: warm yellow lighting, cluttered sharp background, plastic toy-like watch appearance, watermark
